name: Cropper.js

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of hand-written pointer interactions when users need to drag eight-direction handles over an image and obtain precise crop geometry -- native implementations fail on scaled coordinate conversion, boundary constraints, and synchronized multi-direction handles.
en.why_valuable: AI defaults can only draw a static box or write a fragile one-handle demo, not reliable eight-direction resizing, panning, touch input, and image-coordinate round-tripping; Cropper.js directly produces x/y/width/height and can generate a cropped canvas.

data_in.note: Cropper.js 2.x no longer has v1's getData(); the precise read path is cropper.getCropperSelection(), then x/y/width/height. Coordinates belong to the cropper-canvas coordinate system.

image.src: string -- loadable image URL or data URL

selection?._default: when omitted, uses upstream defaults: centered with initialCoverage=0.5

spec.note: The crop area needs an explicit pixel height; default 400px, which AI may override. Do not use vh or percentage heights (iron rule 3); width may follow the container.

when_to_use: 需要让用户在图片上拖拽八向手柄并得到精确裁剪几何时用它,而非手写指针交互——原生在缩放坐标换算、边界约束和多方向手柄同步上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认只能画静态框或写脆弱的单手柄 demo,做不到稳定的八向缩放、平移、触控与图像坐标闭环;Cropper.js 直接产出 x/y/width/height 并可生成裁剪 canvas。

data_in.note: Cropper.js 2.x 不再有 v1 的 getData();精确读法是 cropper.getCropperSelection() 后取 x/y/width/height,坐标属于 cropper-canvas 坐标系。

image.src: string —— 可加载的图片 URL 或 data URL

selection?._default: 省略时采用上游默认:居中且 initialCoverage=0.5

spec.note: 裁剪区需显式像素高度;默认 400px,AI 可覆盖。禁止 vh/百分比高(铁律 3),宽度可跟随容器。

uplink.widget: 消费 AI 自行在确认控件处理器中读取 selection 的 x/y/width/height,再拼 sendPrompt 文案;本条不焊接统一事件出口。
uplink.codex: 消费 AI 自行读取同一几何对象并调用 sendFollowUpMessage。
uplink.artifact: artifact 无上行;提供几何 JSON 或 selection.$toCanvas() 结果的下载导出兜底。

carriers.widget: supported:挂载容器位于 shadowRoot;Cropper.js 2.x 内部元素自带 shadow 样式,无外置 CSS
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN + DOM/canvas,图片 URL 仍须满足宿主 CORS

isolation.evidence: cropper.d.ts: constructor(element,options?:CropperOptions); CropperOptions{container?:Element|string} (L1583) so boot's {container:el} is valid; getCropperSelection():CropperSelection|null; CropperSelection has x/y/width/height (L1600-03) + $change(x,y,width?,height?) (L1677) — boot usage exact. Bundled cropper.esm.js: attachShadow (L462) + per-element shadowRoot.adoptedStyleSheets (L348/L526) so styles stay inside each custom element's own shadow root, no document.head write; customElements.define (L569) is global but custom elements function in shadow DOM; no document.body.appendChild in bundle (mounts into the container). Keyboard nav attaches a document KeyDown listener ($onDocumentKeyDown; keydown/KeyDown L1859-65) but bound via connected/disconnectedCallback, so removing the shadow container cleans it up — not a leak. Web-components mount inside our shadow container = shadow-safe.
